professional.name: Nzenwata Sinclair
professional.title: Full-Stack Developer & Creative Technologist
professional.summary: Passionate developer with expertise in web development, VR/3D experiences, and creative problem-solving. Specialized in React, Node.js, and immersive technologies with a focus on building engaging user experiences that bridge design and functionality.

experience.title: Digital Corps Developer Intern
experience.description: Built and maintained custom video streaming platform for university employees. Implemented full-stack features using React and Node.js with complex state management.
highlights: Implemented React Context for state management, reducing prop drilling
Resolved complex re-rendering issues using useEffect hooks
Built dynamic video player with comment and like functionality
Created responsive design for multiple screen sizes

experience.title: Junior Web Developer
experience.description: Created Corpsify sound search application, my first significant React project. Learned API integration, state management, and debugging with professional mentorship.
highlights: First experience with React and modern JavaScript frameworks
Implemented API integration with comprehensive error handling
Built search functionality with real-time filtering
Learned best practices from industry mentors

experience.title: Freelance Web Developer
experience.description: First freelancing project building a website for service offerings. Foundation for understanding web structure, CSS properties, and component reusability.
highlights: Developed responsive website layout from ground up
Learned CSS fundamentals and Bootstrap framework
Gained experience with scalable layout design
Participated in Digital Corps internship program
Focused on full-stack development and creative computing

about.journey: From Lagos to Muncie and back, my journey in technology has been shaped by curiosity and a passion for creating experiences that matter. Each project represents a step in my growth as a developer.
about.philosophy: I believe in writing code that's not just functional, but beautiful—code that solves real problems and creates lasting value for users.
